name: friction tracker records a skill auto-trigger false positive when operator dismisses an auto-suggested skill
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/friction && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/friction-tracker.sh" --event skill-auto-trigger-fp --skill flow-guard --reason dismissed --at 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'event=skill-auto-trigger-fp' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && grep -q 'skill=flow-guard' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && grep -q 'reason=dismissed' .claude-tdd-pro/friction/events.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
